headline: Built for Leadspace
subheadline: AI infrastructure to unify and segment market data for better customer acquisition

challenges.title: Data Resolution
challenges.desc: Leadspace deals with huge volumes of market data. Validating companies and buyers at scale is complex. Multi-source integration adds to the difficulty.

challenges.title: Unification Issues
challenges.desc: Unifying data from various sources challenges operations. Segmentation for customer acquisition lacks precision. This impacts efficiency for B2B clients.

challenges.title: AI Scaling
challenges.desc: Managing AI for sales and marketing workflows is demanding. Ensuring data accuracy with 54 employees is tough. Growth hurdles affect overall performance.

challenges.title: Operational Growth
challenges.desc: Employee numbers dropped 17% YoY, limiting bandwidth. Handling demanding clients like Microsoft requires better tools. Data aggregation needs future-proofing.

deliverables.title: Data Unification Platform
deliverables.desc: Builds a system to integrate and resolve market data sources, helping Leadspace unify customer information seamlessly

deliverables.title: Segmentation Tool
deliverables.desc: Creates AI-driven segmentation for targeted acquisition, integrating with existing marketing workflows to enhance precision

deliverables.title: Validation Engine
deliverables.desc: Develops AI models for buyer data validation at scale, connecting with Leadspace's platform to improve accuracy

deliverables.title: Growth Framework
deliverables.desc: Sets up scalable infrastructure for operational efficiency, addressing employee and revenue growth challenges

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Evaluate current data systems and identify key pain points

engagementSteps.title: Design Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Prototype AI solutions for data unification and segmentation

engagementSteps.title: Implementation Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy and integrate the new infrastructure for live use

faqItems.question: What does Leadspace specialize in?
faqItems.answer: Leadspace focuses on B2B customer data platforms for data unification and segmentation.

faqItems.question: How can this infrastructure help?
faqItems.answer: It unifies market data to improve customer acquisition and resolve validation challenges.

faqItems.question: What is Leadspace's funding history?
faqItems.answer: Leadspace has raised $107M total, including a $46M Series D round.

faqItems.question: How many employees does Leadspace have?
What are the deliverables?
faqItems.answer: Custom AI systems for data management and growth.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: The initial engagement spans three months.

stackItems.name: AI Platforms
stackItems.role: Handle predictive analytics for data unification

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Integrate with CRM for sales workflows

stackItems.name: Python
stackItems.role: Support AI modeling and data analysis
